g.text: For each rule or tool you build, ask: will it gain value when the model is twice as smart?
fights the model, rots as it improves
code that rewrites cryptic tool errors
so the model can read them
deletable once models read raw errors
gains value as models get smarter
→ tag it · set a sunset date · plan its removal
A gate can be an amplifier: what matters is what it checks, not that it blocks.
the agent is then on its own —
control only at the very end
